_metadata.description: Seed data for the manufacturers table

data.name: FansToys
data.notes: Third-party Masterpiece-scale Transformers manufacturer. Operates sub-brands: Robot Paradise (RP), Perfect Fusion (PF), Fantastic Model (FM)

data.name: Takara Tomy
data.notes: Official Transformers brand owner (Japanese market). Formerly separate companies Takara and Tomy, merged 2006
